summary.intent: Fix multiple review issues on PR #665 in fogodev/ars-ui for the Select component, including SelectItem acceptance from closed state, trigger button type attributes, and keyboard event routing (Enter/Space/Toggle double-firing).
summary.outcome: All four original review threads were resolved with commit 3db47bdb. A follow-up Codex review caught a Space/typeahead regression (Space key carrying character=' ' falling into typeahead when trigger is closed), which was patched, tested locally, and pushed as a separate commit.

repo: The Select component in ars-ui lives at crates/ars-components/src/selection/select/mod.rs
trigger_attrs() and clear_trigger_attrs() must emit type="button" to prevent default form submission behavior
SelectItem must be accepted from the closed state to handle blur-before-option-click race conditions
Closed trigger Enter/Space should not dispatch Toggle to avoid double-toggle when native button click also fires; open trigger Enter/Space should commit the highlighted option
Space key carries character=' ' and must be explicitly gated out of typeahead routing on the closed trigger
CI pipeline runs snapshot/format checks before unit tests; both must pass sequentially
Codex review is triggered via @codex comment on the PR and re-triggered after pushes

code.finding: Space key was not excluded from typeahead dispatch on the closed trigger, causing unintended typeahead activation since Space has character=' '

workflow: gh api graphql can batch-check unresolved PR review threads and resolve them in a single script
resolve() uses the GraphQL resolveReviewThread mutation with a thread node ID (PRRT_... format)
reply() uses the REST API POST to pulls/{number}/comments with in_reply_to to reply inline
CI polling was done with sleep+gh pr checks loops (300s and 420s intervals)
proptest_state_machines tests require --ignored flag and PROPTEST_CASES env var to run
cargo +nightly fmt --all --check is used as a pre-push gate alongside clippy and unit tests

friction: CI takes 5-7+ minutes per push, requiring long sleep-polling loops to check results
Codex review surfaced an additional issue (Space/typeahead) after the initial four fixes were pushed, requiring another commit/push/CI cycle
The transcript contains many bare write_stdin tool calls with no visible content, making it hard to reconstruct the full sequence of user inputs
open_items: Confirm Codex finds no further issues after the Space/typeahead fix is pushed
Await final CI green on the Space/typeahead patch commit before PR can be merged
